evidence: Applicant statement reports about seven months abroad in 2021; presence worksheet is blank; no passport stamps, CBP history, or N-400 travel table provided.
explanation: There is only one approximate data point about 2021 travel and no second corroborating or contradicting source to compare against. Inconsistency requires at least two comparable statements that conflict; absence of additional travel records is open-world absence, not evidence of inconsistency.
